title: HexVR
description: Makes Hex casting in VR more intuitive
body:
# About

HexVR is a client-side addon to Hexcasting to make it better to use with Vivecraft which is a VR mod for Minecraft.

## Features
- Draw spells in mid air!
- Draw multiple patterns at once! (For the ambidextrous casters out there)
- See previous versions of the stack!
- Fully configurable grid! (Fabric only)
- Compatibility with all hex casting addons!
- See each other's casts!
- Give others copies of your stack! (1.19.2 only)
- New patterns for getting position and rotation of VR player's head and hands!
## 1 Handed Setup
- Download the mod and dependencies
- Start SteamVR and Minecraft
- Turn on "Show Advanced Bindings" in VR > Controller settings
- Restart SteamVR and Minecraft
- Go to your SteamVR Controller Bindings 
  - Set a button in the "Modded" tab to "HexVR: Draw Spell" (I like to use left trigger for 1 handing)
  - Remove the binding for the the button you used prior in the "In-Game" tab (Teleport for left trigger)
- Enjoy!
## 2 Handed setup
- Download the mod and dependencies
- Start SteamVR and Minecraft
- Turn on "Show Advanced Bindings" in VR > Controller settings
- Restart SteamVR and Minecraft
- Go to your SteamVR Controller Bindings 
  - Overwrite left trigger in the "In-Game" tab to be for interacting and placing blocks instead of teleport
  - Unbind right and left touchpad in the "In-Game tab"
  - Set the left and right touchpad buttons in the "Modded" tab to "HexVR: Draw Spell - <Hand> - Simple"
  - Enjoy!
